channel.title: SecurityWizardry Vulnerability Radar (RMFconsultoria)
channel.description: Alertas do SecurityWizardry.com Radar Page - Curado por RMFconsultoria

item.title: Ivanti - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Wednesday 10 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | Ivanti Sentry manages IT security; In certain versions, it allows remote unauthenticated OS command injection for root code execution.

item.title: OpenSSL - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Wednesday 10 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | OpenSSL cryptographic library; use-after-free in PKCS#7 signature verification may cause crashes, memory corruption, or remote code execution.

item.title: Fortinet - Security - CVSS Score: v3 - 9.8
item.description: Wednesday 10 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score: v3 - 9.8 | Fortinet FortiSandbox analyses and detects threats; improper input handling allows unauthenticated attackers to execute commands via crafted HTTP requests.

item.title: Microsoft - Monthly - CVSS Score v3 - 3.3-10.0
item.description: Wednesday 10 June 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 3.3-10.0 | Monthly: Number of patches: 208, Number of critical patches: 39. More info....

item.title: Adobe - Monthly - CVSS Score v3 - 3.5-10.0
item.description: Wednesday 10 June 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 3.5-10.0 | Monthly: Number of patches: 123, Number of critical patches: 47.

item.title: Veeam - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.4
item.description: Wednesday 10 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.4 | Veeam Backup and Replication manages data backups; an authenticated domain user can execute remote code on the Backup Server.

item.title: Checkpoint - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 9.3
item.description: Tuesday 09 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.3 | Checkpoint Spark Firewalls secure network traffic; a flaw in IKEv1 lets unauthenticated attackers bypass VPN login without a valid password.

item.title: Siemens - Monthly - CVSS Score v4 - 4.1-10.0
item.description: Tuesday 09 June 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v4 - 4.1-10.0 | Monthly: Number of patches: 21, Number of critical patches: 4.

item.title: SAP - Monthly - CVSS Score: v4 - 3.3-9.3
item.description: Tuesday 09 June 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score: v4 - 3.3-9.3 | Monthly: Number of patches: 15, Number of critical patches: 4.

item.title: Schneider - Monthly - CVSS Score v3 - 4.4-8.7
item.description: Tuesday 09 June 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 4.4-8.7 | Monthly: Number of patches: 6, Number of critical patches: 0. More info....

item.title: Apache - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Tuesday 09 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Apache HTTP Server is a web server software; there is a buffer underwrite flaw in regex configuration.

item.title: QNAP - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Tuesday 09 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | QNAP NAS storage OS enabling data management; XSS flaw allows remote attackers to bypass security or access application data.

item.title: Guardrails - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 9.6
item.description: Monday 08 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.6 | Guardrails AI is a Python framework for building AI apps; a version was maliciously published on PyPI, risking credential exposure. Upgrade advised.

item.title: Altium - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 10.0
item.description: Monday 08 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 10.0 | Altium Enterprise Server manages electronic design data; path traversal in NIS allows unauthenticated file write/read, risking code execution.

item.title: Riello UPS - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - 9.3
item.description: Monday 08 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - 9.3 | Riello UPS NetMan 204 monitors power systems; it has a hard-coded backdoor 'eurek' allowing remote admin access via login.cgi endpoint.

item.title: VMware - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - Multiple
item.description: Monday 08 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | VMware VMSA‑2026‑0004: High‑severity XSS flaws allow script injection in Cloud Foundation Operations and related products. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained

item.title: Arista - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Friday 05 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Arista EOS network OS manages IPsec; crafted packets can halt IPsec traffic processing, causing persistent disruption despite resets.

item.title: Microsoft - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Friday 05 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | Microsoft Azure HorizonDB is a cloud database service; it has an authentication bypass allowing privilege escalation over a network.

item.title: Mobatek - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - 9.8
item.description: Friday 05 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - 9.8 | Mobatek MobaXterm is a remote access tool; it has an SEH buffer overflow in session username allowing remote code execution.

item.title: RedHat - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.6
item.description: Friday 05 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.6 | OpenShift Pipelines manages CI/CD workflows; flaw lets authenticated users alter workload scheduling, priorities, and TLS secrets via rolebinding. More info....

item.title: Linux Kernel - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Friday 05 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Linux kernel flaw allows malicious ICMP packets to abuse IPPROTO_RAW sockets, altering routing cache and impacting integrity/availability.

item.title: ABB - OT - CVSS Score v4 - 9.9
item.description: Thursday 04 June 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v4 - 9.9 | ABB T-MAC Plus industrial control system; external parties can access files or directories, risking data exposure.

item.title: Cisco - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.6
item.description: Thursday 04 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.6 | Cisco Unified Communications Manager manages voice and video calls; SSRF flaw allows remote attacker to write files and escalate to root if WebDialer enabled.

item.title: Securly - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - -
item.description: Thursday 04 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - - | Securly Chrome extension vulnerabilities expose data, weaken encryption, and enable manipulation.

item.title: Authentik - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Wednesday 03 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | goauthentik authentik identity provider; Source stage bypass via empty POST, fixed in later versions.

item.title: MISP - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.2
item.description: Wednesday 03 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.2 | MISP threat intel platform; LDAP mixed auth with OTP enabled allows bypass of OTP, granting access without valid OTP verification.

item.title: OpenClaude - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - 9.3
item.description: Wednesday 03 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - 9.3 | Gitlawb OpenClaude CLI for cloud/local models; sandbox escape via dangerouslyDisableSandbox allowed full host code execution.

item.title: Amazon - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.8
item.description: Wednesday 03 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | AWS Kiro IDE: cloud-based development environment; lacks access control in file write tool, allowing remote command execution via crafted writes. More info....

item.title: SolarWinds - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.2
item.description: Wednesday 03 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.2 | SolarWinds Web Help Desk manages IT support tickets; a denial-of-service flaw can crash the server by exhausting memory.

item.title: Cloud Foundry - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Tuesday 02 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | Cloud Foundry UAA auth server exposes EC private keys via /token_keys endpoint due to improper key handling, allowing leakage of JWT signing keys in EC configurations

item.title: Qualcomm - Monthly - CVSS Score v3 - 5.5-8.8
item.description: Tuesday 02 June 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 5.5-8.8 | Qualcomm - Monthly Number of patches: 24, Number of critical patches: 2

item.title: Android - Monthly - CVSS Score: v3 - -
item.description: Tuesday 02 June 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score: v3 - - | Google Android - Monthly Number of patches: 110, Number of critical patches: 15.

item.title: HP - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.2
item.description: Tuesday 02 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.2 | HP Inc. Poly Trio 8300 voice conference phone; buffer overflow in ICE feature may allow remote code execution on Linux platform. More info....

item.title: Ivanti - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Tuesday 02 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Ivanti Neurons for ITSM manages IT services; improper access control lets remote authenticated users gain admin access.

item.title: NVIDIA - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - -
item.description: Tuesday 02 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - - | NVIDIA NVTabular update fixes high‑severity deserialization vulnerabilities enabling code execution.

item.title: Waterfall - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Monday 01 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | Waterfall WF-500 sec device for network isolation; OS command injection in WebUI allows remote unauthenticated command execution on device.

item.title: CheckPoint - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Monday 01 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Check Point Quantum Gateway VPN firewall: IKE fragment mishandling causes heap out‑of‑bounds write, allowing remote attackers to crash the VPN service (DoS).

item.title: NI - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Monday 01 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | NI SystemLink Enterprise manages system data and devices; it has an authentication bypass allowing remote attackers privilege escalation or data leaks.

item.title: FreePBX - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Monday 01 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | FreePBX IP PBX system; unauthenticated users may access User Control Panel via default credentials if not changed, fixed in 16.0.45 and 17.0.7. More info....

item.title: OTRS - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Monday 01 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | OTRS AG OTRS 8.0.x: Ticketing system for service management; SQL injection in database layer allows unauthenticated authentication bypass if NO_BACKSLASH_ESCAPES mode set.

item.title: Apache - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Monday 01 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Apache Directory LDAP API: Fails to verify server cert hostname, enabling MITM attacks through acceptance of mismatched or untrusted certificates.

item.title: Oracle - Monthly - CVSS Score v3 - 4.5-10.0
item.description: Friday 29 May 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 4.5-10.0 | Monthly: Number of patches: 35, Number of critical patches: 11.

item.title: RustFS - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Friday 29 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | RustFS distributed storage system; a default shared secret "rustfsadmin" is used for RPC authentication, risking exposure.

item.title: CodeWhale - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.6
item.description: Friday 29 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.6 | CodeWhale terminal coding agent runs cargo tests auto-approved, allowing arbitrary code execution and potential credential theft.

item.title: Samba - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.0
item.description: Friday 29 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.0 | Samba file server enabling SMB/CIFS sharing; remote command execution via misconfigured check password script using unescaped %u in samba-dcerpcd service. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained

item.title: Veeam - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.4
item.description: Thursday 28 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.4 | Veeam Service Provider Console manages backup services; versions ≤9.2 allow remote code execution via a vulnerability.

item.title: Google - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.4
item.description: Thursday 28 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.4 | Google MCP Toolbox for Databases manages database connections; vulnerable to DNS rebinding via SSE due to hardcoded Access-Control-Allow-Origin header.

item.title: Dell - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - -
item.description: Thursday 28 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - - | Dell Data Lakehouse has multiple critical third‑party vulnerabilities that could allow system compromise.

item.title: Microsoft - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Thursday 28 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Microsoft UFO automates tasks across devices allows authenticated Web clients to spoof roles and hijack tasks. More info....

item.title: GitLab - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.2
item.description: Thursday 28 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.2 | GitLab: Web-based DevOps platform enabling CI/CD pipelines. Authenticated users could trigger Duo AI workflows as another user due to identity flaw.

item.title: Synology - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Thursday 28 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Synology DiskStation Manager (DSM) is a NAS management system; vulnerability allows remote attackers to bypass SSO authentication using known distinguished name.

item.title: OpenVPN - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 9.4
item.description: Wednesday 27 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 9.4 | OpenVPN Connect VPN client for secure connections; privilege escalation via local IPC allows command execution with elevated rights on macOS.

item.title: Tanium - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Wednesday 27 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Tanium Connect integrates data for IT operations; an unauthorized code execution flaw.

item.title: Checkpoint - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Wednesday 27 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Checkpoint Quantum Security Gateway R82 secures networks; mishandles IKE fragment on port 500/UDP causing VPN service crash and denial of service.

item.title: factionsecurity - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Wednesday 27 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | FACTION PenTesting report tool; allows unauthenticated attackers to read, modify, deactivate, or delete boilerplate templates. More info....

item.title: GitHub - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.2
item.description: Wednesday 27 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.2 | GitHub Enterprise Server manages code repositories; SSRF flaw allowed unauthenticated attackers to access internal services via crafted requests.

item.title: RedHat - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.2
item.description: Wednesday 27 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.2 | Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8 OS platform; GNUTLS flaw allows bypass of certificate validation via oversized SAN, risking spoofing or MITM attacks.

item.title: NordVPN - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Tuesday 26 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | NordVPN secure VPN service; flaw lets unauthenticated attackers crash it by sending an overly long password input causing DoS.

item.title: F5 - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.2
item.description: Tuesday 26 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.2 | F5 NGINX web server/reverse proxy; flaw allows crafted requests to trigger heap overflow leading to a restart or code execution.

item.title: CODESYS - OT - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Tuesday 26 May 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | CODESYS Control PLC control runtime; flaw allows crafted requests to trigger out-of-bounds write causing a denial of service via crash.

item.title: IBM - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.8
item.description: Tuesday 26 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | IBM Quantum Safe Explorer used vulnerable libraries allowed data tampering, authentication bypass, DOS, and MITM attacks. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained

item.title: TrendMicro - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 7.2-9.8
item.description: Friday 22 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 7.2-9.8 | Apex One 2019 and Apex One as a Service protect endpoints; flaws allow remote code execution and privilege escalation.

item.title: Ubiquiti - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 7.7-10.0
item.description: Friday 22 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 7.7-10.0 | UniFi OS Server and other devices; flaws allow remote command injection, unauthorised system changes, path traversal, and data exposure.

item.title: Honeywell - OT - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Friday 22 May 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Honeywell Control Network Module manages industrial networks; it has a command injection flaw in its web interface allowing remote code execution.

item.title: LiteLLM - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.8
item.description: Friday 22 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | LiteLLM by berriai provides API key management; internal users can create keys bypassing role limits, enabling privilege escalation. More info....

item.title: Mattermost - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Friday 22 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Mattermost collaboration platform; path traversal flaw allows authenticated users to call arbitrary API via system admin token in integration URL.

item.title: IBM - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - Multiple
item.description: Friday 22 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | IBM Multiple vulnerabilities in Axios enable flaws enable code execution, authentication bypass, data tampering, SSRF, header injection and DoS.

item.title: Cisco - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | Cisco Secure Workload protects workloads; flaw in REST API access validation allows remote attacker to gain Site Admin privileges and alter configurations.

item.title: Microsoft - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Microsoft Malware Protection Engine scans for malware; heap-based buffer overflow in Microsoft Defender allows remote code execution.

item.title: NLnet - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | NLnet Labs Unbound DNS resolver caches DNS data; allow cache poisoning via spoofed authority section records.

item.title: LiteSpeed - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 10.0 | LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin manages web hosting control; it allows privilege escalation via Redis feature mishandling, exploited in May 2026. More info....

item.title: HP - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | HP Linux Imaging and Printing Software manages printing tasks; integer overflow in hpcups may allow privilege escalation or code execution.

item.title: IBM - Patch - CVSS Score 9.1-10.
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score 9.1-10. | IBM Guardium Data Protection has multiple high and critical vulnerabilities including denial-of-service, memory corruption, and certificate validation flaws.

item.title: Definitions - Type - Monthly - N/A
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Monthly | N/A | Vendors of cyber security products should know better and given their importance they are highlighted when vulnerable, often combined with critival severity +24hrs This bottom descriptor is used with Indicates an alert state which has been present for more than 24 hours. This bottom descriptor indicates that patches are available for vulnerabilities, whether it is the initial report or a patch of a vulnerability that had been previously reported. This bottom descriptor indicates that an Exploit has been made public for a vulnerability, whether it is the initial report or an indication of an exploit for a vulnerability that had been previously reported. This bottom descriptor indicates that the vulnerable product is Operational Technology (OT) such as an Industrial Control System (ICS). OT is not to be confused with Information Technology (IT) This bottom descriptor indicates that a vulnerability has been announced without the opportunity for the vendor to patch it before the details are made known. Whilst vulnerabilities reported are remotely exploitable, there are rare occasions when we will report on a vulnerability with a locally exploitable attack vector (AV:L) Several vendors release multiple patches on or around the same day each month. The severity level will reflect the highest vulnerability © Computer Network Defence Limited 2026 Privacy Notice Terms & Conditions Send us a Message
